_comment: Copy to config.json to override defaults. config.json is gitignored. All keys are optional; anything omitted falls back to autofactorio/config.py.

llm._note: Golden Eye OpenAI-compatible gateway. NewsMachine uses :21351 / qwen2.5:14b-instruct; this game defaults to the SimCity_LLM game-AI config (:21345 / qwen3:4b).
